lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਝਹੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਬੂਝਣਾ ਏਹ ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: boojhahu giaanee boojhanaa eeh akath kathaa man maeh |
lines.english: O spiritual teachers, understand this: the Unspoken Speech is in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਲਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਸਭ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur tat na paaeeai alakh vasai sabh maeh |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the essence of reality is not found; the Invisible Lord dwells everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾਂ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta jaaneeai jaan sabad vasai man maeh |
lines.english: One meets the True Guru, and then the Lord is known, when the Word of the Shabad comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਇਆ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਗਇਆ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਦੁਖ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aap geaa bhram bhau geaa janam maran dukh jaeh |
lines.english: When self-conceit departs, doubt and fear also depart, and the pain of birth and death is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਈਐ ਊਤਮ ਮਤਿ ਤਰਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramat alakh lakhaaeeai aootam mat taraeh |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, the Unseen Lord is seen; the intellect is exalted, and one is carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਹੰ ਹੰਸਾ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਹੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਤਿਸੈ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sohan hansaa jap jaapahu tribhavan tisai samaeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, chant the chant of 'Sohang hansaa' - 'He is me, and I am Him.' The three worlds are absorbed in Him. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਪਰਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man maanak jin parakhiaa gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: Some assay their mind-jewel, and contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਕਲਜੁਗ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: se jan virale jaaneeeh kalajug vich sansaar |
lines.english: Only a few of those humble beings are known in this world, in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਨੋ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aapai no aap mil rahiaa haumai dubidhaa maar |
lines.english: One's self remains blended with the Lord's Self, when egotism and duality are conquered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਨ ਭਾਲਨੀ ਮੁਠੇ ਅਹੰਮਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andar na bhaalanee mutthe ahamate |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not search within their own selves; they are deluded by their egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰੇ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate dutar tare bhaujal bikham sansaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are imbued with the Naam cross over the difficult, treacherous and terrifying world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur kinai na paaeo har naam har sate |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one finds the Naam, the Name of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾਂ ਭਵਿ ਥਕੇ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਤਿਖ ਤਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaan bhav thake andar tikh tate |
lines.english: Wandering in the four directions, they grow weary, tormented by burning desire within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ ਨ ਸੋਧਨੀ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਵਿਗੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: sinmrit saasat na sodhanee manamukh vigute |
lines.english: They do not study the Simritees and the Shaastras; the manmukhs waste away and are lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਤੇ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: tat giaan veechaariaa har jap har gate |19|
lines.english: One who contemplates the essence of spiritual wisdom and meditates on the Lord is saved. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਣੈ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: aape jaanai kare aap aape aanai raas |
lines.english: He Himself knows, He Himself acts, and He Himself does it right.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੈ ਅਗੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਖਲਿਇ ਕੀਚੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tisai agai naanakaa khalie keechai aradaas |1|
lines.english: So stand before Him, O Nanak, and offer your prayers. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin keea tin dekhiaa aape jaanai soe |
lines.english: He who created the creation, watches over it; He Himself knows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਹੀਐ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਾ ਘਰਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kis no kaheeai naanakaa jaa ghar varatai sabh koe |2|
lines.english: Unto whom should I speak, O Nanak, when everything is contained within the home of the heart? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਚੁਕੈ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ਮਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa chukai janam na jaeh mar |
lines.english: Your comings and goings in reincarnation shall cease; you shall not be reborn and die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਥੋਕ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਮਿਤੁ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe thok visaar iko mit kar |
lines.english: Forget everything, and be friends with the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਪਾਪਾ ਦਹੈ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan hoe nihaal paapaa dahai har |
lines.english: Your mind and body shall be enraptured, and the Lord shall burn away your sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸੰਜਿ ਧਰਿ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam nidhaan man meh sanj dhar |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, gather in the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within your mind. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਸੋਗਿ ਨ ਮੋਹਿ ਜਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sach naam aadhaar sog na mohi jar |
lines.english: The True Name shall be your Support, and you shall not burn in sorrow and attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਦੰਮਾ ਦੰਮ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa manahu na veesarai maangai damaa dam |
lines.english: You do not forget Maya from your mind; you beg for it with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹੀ ਕਰੰਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so prabh chit na aavee naanak nahee karam |1|
lines.english: You do not even think of that God; O Nanak, it is not in your karma. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਤੂਟਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਬੰਧ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan dhiaae too tootteh maaeaa bandh |2|
lines.english: Meditate on the Guru's Feet, and the bonds of Maya shall be cut away from you. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਕਿਆ ਲਪਟਾਵਹਿ ਅੰਧ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa saath na chalee kiaa lapattaaveh andh |
lines.english: Maya and its wealth shall not go along with you, so why do you cling to it - are you blind?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਿਓਨੁ ਭਾਣੈ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai satigur melion bhaanai sach dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: By the Pleasure of His Will, He leads us to meet the True Guru; by the Pleasure of His Will, we meditate on the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮਨਾਇਓਨੁ ਭਾਣੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai hukam manaaeon bhaanai sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: By the Pleasure of His Will, the Lord inspires us to obey the Hukam of His Command; by the Pleasure of His Will, we find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੇ ਜੇਵਡ ਹੋਰ ਦਾਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaane jevadd hor daat naahee sach aakh sunaaeaa |
lines.english: There is no other gift as great as the Pleasure of His Will; this Truth is spoken and proclaimed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tin sach kamaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny, practice and live the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tis saranaagatee jin jagat upaaeaa |21|
lines.english: Nanak has entered His Sanctuary; He created the world. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਭੈ ਕੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau andar giaan nahee bhai kee naahee bind |
lines.english: Those who do not have spiritual wisdom within, do not have even an iota of the Fear of God.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੁਇਆ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਮਾਰਣਾ ਜਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਾਰੇ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mueaa kaa kiaa maaranaa ji aap maare govind |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, why kill those who are already dead? The Lord of the Universe Himself has killed them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਹਰਿ ਪੜੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har saalaahe har parrai gur kai sabad veechaar |
lines.english: He praises the Lord, and reads of the Lord, and contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਪਤ੍ਰੀ ਵਾਚਣੀ ਸੁਖੀ ਹੂ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man kee patree vaachanee sukhee hoo sukh saar |
lines.english: To read the horoscope of the mind, is the most sublime joyful peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣੁ ਭਲਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: so braahaman bhalaa aakheeai ji boojhai braham beechaar |
lines.english: He alone is called a good Brahmin, who understands God in contemplative meditation.
